case_title: DELEMOS, PHILIP vs. MARTIN, WEISS et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATOR APPOINTED, GONZALES, ROBERT EUGENE (034408), ARB-5 MAILED

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELEMOS, PHILIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTIN, WEISS $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00
